seo_content:
Funded Trading Plus Technical Infrastructure

Funded Trading Plus, based in the United Kingdom, was established in November 2021. It is a CFD proprietary trading firm offering One-Phase Experienced (1-step), Two-Phase Advanced (2-step), and Instant (No Evaluation) programs, along with Prestige Lite, Premium, and Pro tracks for advanced traders. Account sizes span from $5,000 to $200,000. A coupon code (LAUNCH) delivers 10% off applicable programs. The firm's profit split structure is designed to scale with trader performance, starting at 80% and reaching 100% based on cumulative earnings milestones.

The One-Phase Experienced 1-step is available in three sizes: $12,500 at $107.10 (original $119.00), $25,000 at $179.10 (original $199.00), and $200,000 at $854.10 (original $949.00). The Two-Phase Advanced 2-step is offered at $50,000 for $359.10 (original $399.00) and $100,000 for $494.10 (original $549.00). The Instant No Evaluation program covers five sizes: $5,000 at $202.50 (original $225.00), $10,000 at $405.00 (original $450.00), $25,000 at $1,012.50 (original $1,125.00), $50,000 at $2,025.00 (original $2,250.00), and $100,000 at $4,050.00 (original $4,500.00). Payments are accepted via Credit/Debit Card and Crypto.

Four platforms are supported: cTrader, DXTrade, Match Trader, and MT5. Tradable instruments include FX, Metals, Indices, Energy, Crypto, and Other Commodities. Leverage is uniform across all program types: FX at 1:30, Metals at 1:30, Energy at 1:30, Indices at 1:20, and Crypto at 1:2. News trading is permitted across all programs, provided the trade does not constitute a one-sided bet — meaning a trader may not risk the majority of their account balance on a single news event. Weekend holding is permitted for most programs; Advance and Master Trader Programs must close all positions by 4:30 pm EST on Fridays. Crypto can be held over weekends on all programs.

The profit split starts at 80% for all programs. Upgrades are permanent: traders reach 90% upon achieving 20% cumulative profit and 100% upon achieving 30% cumulative profit, for the lifetime of the account. Payout frequency for 1-step, Advanced, and Instant programs is on-demand for the first payout, then weekly thereafter. Prestige Lite and Premium operate on weekly payouts. Prestige Pro offers flexible weekly or bi-weekly scheduling. Minimum payout is $50 for standard programs; Prestige Lite and Pro require a minimum of 1% of the initial account balance. A maximum of 2 funded accounts is permitted per trader. Payout methods are Bank Transfer and Crypto.

Funded Trading Plus prohibits hedging across multiple accounts (internal same-account hedging is allowed), account sharing and third-party management, one-sided bets, gambling to pass evaluations, and over-leveraging. For Prestige Lite and Pro accounts, a 2% symbol loss limit per day applies as a hard breach rule. EAs are permitted on cTrader and MT5, provided they do not use abusive strategies such as arbitrage, grid trading, or any method that exploits the platform. Copy trading from the trader's own or other prop firm accounts into Funded Trading Plus is allowed; copying between the trader's own Funded Trading Plus accounts is prohibited. Inactivity beyond 30 consecutive days on both evaluation and funded accounts results in account termination.
